findings.summary: Phase 2 has 6 independent lanes to complete. All lanes touch different files. Zero contention except i18n/en.ts and ipc.ts shared files use produce_fragment.
MCP dialog-select-mcp.tsx is the reference CRUD pattern for plugin UI. Uses window.api pattern, electron-store, Dialog from @opencode-ai/ui/dialog.
home.tsx has existing dirty TimeFilter work-in-progress. Search/filter state, TimeFilter type, filtered records memo already started.
prompt-input.tsx (2155 lines) has full @mention system with AtOption, SlashCommand, PromptPopover. ComposerPicker, ComposerAgentControl exist for agent display.
command.tsx (438 lines) has full useCommand system with Keybind, CommandOption, CommandCatalogItem, showPalette. 27 useCommand call sites across 14 files.
store.ts uses electron-store with getStore(name). IPC handlers in ipc.ts follow registerIpcHandlers(deps) pattern with window.api bridge.
Plugin Management UI cartography complete. 6 smoking guns found including BLOCKER dangling IPC channel. DesktopPluginProvider/DesktopPluginLoader exist but no management UI.
Shared file strategy: ipc.ts, preload/types.ts, preload/index.ts use produce_fragment. Only 4 dirty files preserved.
home.tsx TimeFilter work already started: MenuV2.RadioGroup, luxon-based filtering. Missing i18n, debounce, fuzzysort. session.agent/model fields available for agent/model filtering.
No palette UI exists. showPalette() opens file dialog. ~50 commands across 11 categories. fuzzysort+useFilteredList available but not wired. Dirty key-hint-overlay.tsx is 250-line WIP.
No @general mention exists. AtOption needs 'delegate' discriminant. 10-step extension pattern documented. Composer controls are private to prompt-input.tsx. Zero test coverage for @mention system.
BLOCKER: dangling IPC channel get-desktop-plugin-config. PluginKind omits 'desktop'. Plugin provider/loader exists but no UI. 4 dirty files preserved. 3 shared files need produce_fragment.
Export/import is greenfield. dialog-fork.tsx is template. save-file-picker IPC ready. @zip.js/zip.js already used. No sanitization utility. Active Postgres migration affects session tables.
GitHub integration greenfield. parseGitHubRemote dead code. @octokit/rest unused. OAuth patterns exist. Review tab is PR entry point.
All 6 Phase 2 lanes complete. 6 commits pushed to dev (b98c0f79→aae417b4). Files changed across packages: app, desktop, opencode, sdk. All checkpoints published.
